pull.title: check-abi: explicitly provide public headers
pull.body: Without this commit, the check-abi shell script outputs false positives because it consider some headers public that are actually not public.

check-abi: explicitly provide public headers

Without this commit, the check-abi shell script outputs false positives because
it consider some headers public that are actually not public.

check-abi: explicitly provide public headers

Without this commit, the check-abi shell script outputs false positives because
it consider some headers public that are actually not public.
